title: Department for Culture, Media and Sport - Report under Section 179 of the Data Protection Act 2018
body: " November 2022 report: This report was completed under the 2022 to 2024 Sunak Conservative government and was laid in Parliament 24 November 2022.  May 2024 report: This report was completed under the 2022 to 2024 Sunak Conservative government and was laid in Parliament 1 May 2024.   These reports were undertaken under Section 179 of the Data Protection Act 2018 (see Annex A for the full text of Section 179). "
